subcodes.first_line: We make mention of thee when thy letter came before the Throne, that thou mayest read and be among them that render thanks. The world hath been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرناک اذ حضر کتابک لدی العرش لتقرء و تکون من الشاکرین قد تنور العالم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
